message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  DatabaseBorderColor #666666
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ArrowColor #222222
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor User as U
participant "WebSite" as W
participant "Server" as S
database "phonebook" as P

U -> W : select contact
U -> W : click button\n"DeleteContact"

activate W
W -> S : deleteContact()
activate S
S -> P : Update()
activate P
P --> S : ok
deactivate P
S --> W : ok
deactivate S
deactivate W

activate W
W -> S : getAllContacts()
activate S
S -> P : findAll()
activate P
P --> S : ContactsList
deactivate P
S --> W : ContactsList
deactivate S
deactivate W

@enduml
```
